# OKIKE

> OKIKE is a software house and academy. We build high-performance products for ambitious teams and train the next generation of African engineers.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of OKIKE — what we build and who we teach.
- [Services](/services): Web, mobile, and custom software packages with fixed scope and timeline.
- [Academy](/learn): A 12-week cohort program that takes students from beginner to industry-ready engineer.
- [About](/about): Founder story, mission, and operating principles.
- [Book a project](/book): Interactive builder to scope a project and request a proposal.
- [Enroll](/enroll): Apply for the next academy cohort.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the team.
